case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. ALEXXUS RAVEN HAMILTON

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SOFIA REYES, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $661.98 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT HAMILTON, ALEXXUS RAVEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-23-2020 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$50.00) SERVED DEC-02-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT HAMILTON, ALEXXUS RAVEN

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-23-2020 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. REPRESENTED BY SOFIA REYES, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ALEXXUS RAVEN HAMILTON IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HAMILTON, ALEXXUS RAVEN $661.98 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $741.98 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
